descriptions.paldb: While in party, increases Defense of Neutral Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes makes High Quality Cloth when assigned to Ranch.

descriptions.game8: Triggers explosions when attacking Ivy-Covered enemies and protects the player and allied Pals from the World Tree's Explosive Spores.
descriptions.paldb: While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with Ivy-Covered, the enemy explodes, dealing additional damage equal to (40~60)% of the player's attack damage. (Does not stack) Also grants immunity to the World Tree's Explosive Spores to both the player and their Pals.

descriptions.game8: When activated, Skutlass becomes the player's katana. It becomes incapacitated after using Iaigiri or if it stays transformed for an extended period.
descriptions.paldb: When activated, Skutlass becomes the player's katana (Attack: (2600~3900)). If it does not revert to its normal form quickly, Skutlass will become incapacitated. It will also become incapacitated if Iaigiri is used.

descriptions.game8: When activated, Skutlass Ignis becomes the player's katana. It becomes incapacitated after using Iaigiri or if it stays transformed for an extended period.
descriptions.paldb: When activated, Skutlass Ignis becomes the player's katana (Attack: (2900~4200)). If it does not revert to its normal form quickly, Skutlass Ignis will become incapacitated. It will also become incapacitated if Iaigiri is used.

descriptions.game8: While in the party, attacking Electrified enemies triggers an electrical burst that spreads damage to nearby enemies.
descriptions.paldb: While in party, when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with Electrify, the enemy discharges electricity, dealing damage equal to (40~60)% of the player's attack damage to nearby enemies. (Does not stack.)

descriptions.wiki-gg: When activated, uses its sharp sense of smell to detect nearby Chromite. While fighting together, a large amount of Chromite is obtained.

descriptions.game8: When activated, uses its sharp sense of smell to detect nearby Chromite. While fighting together, a large amount of Chromite is obtained.
descriptions.paldb: When activated, uses its sharp sense of smell to detect nearby Chromite. While fighting together, Chromite acquisition increases by +(100~200)%.

descriptions.game8: Increases the Cooling Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals.
descriptions.paldb: While at a base, increases the Cooling Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

descriptions.game8: While in the party, the player's attacks inflict Electrify.
descriptions.paldb: While in party, the player's attacks inflict Electrify (2~6). (Does not stack)

descriptions.game8: While in the party, player and party Pals take less Water damage, and are immune to Soak.
descriptions.paldb: While in party, player and party Pals take (15~30)% less Water damage, and are immune to Soak. (Does not stack)

descriptions.game8: While in the party, reduces enemy detection.
descriptions.paldb: While in party, reduces the chance of being detected by enemies. (Does not stack)

descriptions.game8: While in the party, increases the player's Attack in party of different Pal species.
descriptions.paldb: While in party, increases the player's Attack by (30~80)% if all Pals in party are different species. (Does not stack)

descriptions.game8: Functions as a water mount. While in party, makes it easier to fish up talented Pals.
descriptions.paldb: Can be ridden to travel on water. While in party, makes it easier to fish up talented Pals. (Does not stack)

descriptions.game8: Functions as a water mount. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Electric and increases Attack. While in party, makes it easier to fish up talented Pals.
descriptions.paldb: Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, changes the player's attack type to Electric and increases Attack by (5~20)%. While in party, makes it easier to fish up talented Pals. (Does not stack)

descriptions.game8: While in the party, increases the capture rate of Pals afflicted with Ivy-Covered.
descriptions.paldb: While in party, increases the capture rate of Pals afflicted with Ivy-Covered. (Does not stack)

descriptions.game8: Functions as a mount that can perform a Boosts Jump Power. Increases Pal's Movement Speed for every Neutral Pal in your party.
descriptions.paldb: Can be ridden. Boosts Jump Power while mounted. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by (5~25)% for each other Neutral Pal in your party. (Excluding Starryon Primo)

descriptions.game8: When activated, Tanzee Ignis will mercilessly fire a Fire assault rifle at nearby enemies for a limited time.
descriptions.paldb: When activated, Tanzee Ignis will mercilessly fire a Fire assault rifle at nearby enemies for a limited time.

descriptions.game8: Functions as mount. Increases the Mining Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals.
descriptions.paldb: Can be ridden While at a base, increases the Mining Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1. (Does not stack)

descriptions.game8: Functions as a mount. While in the party, increases the durability of all weapons and armor.
descriptions.paldb: Can be ridden. While in party, increases the durability of all weapons and armor by (80~100)%. (Does not stack)

descriptions.game8: While in the party, extends the invincibility period during dodge rolls and dodge steps.
descriptions.paldb: While in party, extends the invincibility period during dodge rolls and dodge steps by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

descriptions.game8: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Ice and increases Attack by 5%.
descriptions.paldb: Can be ridden. While mounted, changes the player’s attack type to Ice and increases Attack by (5~20)%.

descriptions.game8: While in the party, reduces the effects of gravity on the player.
descriptions.paldb: While in party, reduces the effects of gravity on the player, making them more floaty while jumping and falling. (Does not stack)

descriptions.game8: While in the party, the player's attacks inflict Blind.
descriptions.paldb: While in party, the player's attacks inflict Blind (2~6). (Does not stack)

descriptions.game8: While in the party, grants additional jump and additional mid-air dash.
descriptions.paldb: While in party, grants 1 additional jump and 1 additional mid-air dash. (Does not stack)

descriptions.wiki-gg: When fighting together, increases player's movement speed and Changes the player's attack type to Grass

descriptions.paldb: While in party, increases Defense of Dark Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack)

descriptions.game8: While at a base, reduces Hunger depletion. Occasionally drops Caramel Cotton Candy when assigned to Ranch.
descriptions.paldb: Sometimes drops Caramel Cotton Candy when assigned to Ranch. While at a base, reduces Hunger depletion rate of Base Pals by (-15~-25)%. (Does not stack)

descriptions.wiki-gg: Can be ridden. While in the team, it's easier to obtain Meteorite Fragment and Pure Quartz.
descriptions.game8: Functions as mount. While in the team, you can obtain more Meteorite Fragments and Pure Quartz.
Functions as mount. While in the party, increases the player's energy weapon damage.
descriptions.paldb: Can be ridden. While in party, increases the player's energy weapon damage by (10~35)%. (Does not stack)

descriptions.wiki-gg: (TBA)

descriptions.paldb: Can be ridden as a flying mount. While in party, damage done by Partner Skills of weapon-wielding Pals increases by (20~50)%. (Does not stack)

descriptions.wiki-gg: While in the team, increases damage dealt to ores, and it's easier to obtain Meteorite Fragment.
descriptions.game8: While in the team, increases damage dealt to ores, and it's easier to obtain Meteorite Fragment.

descriptions.wiki-gg: Can be ridden. Enhances Fire attacks while mounted.

descriptions.paldb: Can be ridden. This Pal's Defense and Movement Speed increase by (5~14)% for each Melpaca in party.

descriptions.wiki-gg: Can be ridden. Changes the player's attack type to Dark while mounted.

descriptions.paldb: While in party, reduces the weight of ingredient and food by (30~60)%. When paired with another Ice Pal, their Rot Speed also reduces by (-30~-80)%. (Does not stack)

descriptions.wiki-gg: Can be ridden as a flying mount.
descriptions.game8: Increases base mount speed and enables mounting for Nitewing.
descriptions.paldb: Can be ridden as a flying mount.

descriptions.wiki-gg: When fighting together, changes the player's attack type to Dark.
descriptions.game8: Reveals the locations of nearby Pal Effigies when activated.
descriptions.paldb: When activated, detects the location of nearby Pal Effigies.

descriptions.paldb: While in party, increases Party Pals' EXP gained by (40~80)%. (Does not stack)

descriptions.wiki-gg: While fighting together, Water Pals drop more items when defeated.
descriptions.game8: While in the party, landing bullet hits temporarily boosts the Attack and Defense of your active Pal. The effect can stack multiple times.
descriptions.paldb: While in party, hitting an enemy with a bullet increases the Attack and Defense of the Pal fighting alongside you by (1~5)% for 5 seconds. This effect stacks up to 30 times. (Does not stack.)

descriptions.wiki-gg: Can be ridden. Runs faster over grass.
descriptions.game8: Functions as mount. Runs faster over grass.
descriptions.paldb: Can be ridden. Movement Speed is increased by (155~240)% while mounted on grass.

descriptions.wiki-gg: When activated, it can analyze airborne particles and find a dungeon's exit.
descriptions.game8: While in the party, increases player's and pal's damage to enemies afflicted with Poison.

descriptions.wiki-gg: Can be ridden. Keeps the rider cool in hot environments.
descriptions.game8: Increases base mount speed and enables mounting for Reindrix. Keeps the rider cool in hot environments.
descriptions.paldb: Can be ridden. While in party, the player gains Heat Resistance +2. (Does not stack)

descriptions.game8: Improves the player's mining efficiency while riding Reptyro Cryst.
descriptions.paldb: Can be ridden. While in party, reduces weight of all types of ore by (35~65)%. (Does not stack)

descriptions.wiki-gg: While in team, increases Attack of Fire Pals.
descriptions.game8: While Rooby is in your party, your active Fire Pal's defense is increased.
descriptions.paldb: While in party, increases Defense of Fire Pals by (15~30)%. (Does not stack) Sometimes drops Flame Organ when assigned to Ranch.

descriptions.paldb: Can be ridden. While in party, the player's attacks inflict Muddy (2~6). (Does not stack)

descriptions.paldb: Can be ridden as a flying mount. This Pal’s Movement Speed increases by (5~25)% for each other Water Pal in your party. (Excluding Suzaku Aqua)

descriptions.game8: Unlocks the ability to mount Sweepa. Sweepa gains a small damage and defense increase for each Swee included in the party.
descriptions.paldb: Can be ridden. This Pal's Attack and Defense increase by (12~24)% for each Swee in party.
